mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, message, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{message}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, type, message, is_read, created_at FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND is_deleted = 0
